name: Baby
description: A young'un. Needs a House to grow up in.

name: Builder
effect: Twice as fast when crafting cards that require a villager

name: Explorer
effect: Twice as fast when exploring Locations but 20% slower on everything else
description: Very fast at exploring Locations, but slightly slower at other tasks

name: Fisher
effect: Twice as fast when working on a Fishing Spot and catches Mackerels instead of Cods
description: An expert at fishing. Fish fear him

name: Lumberjack
effect: Twice as fast when working on a Lumber Camp, Apple Tree, or Tree

name: Merchant
description: Selling a Dragon Egg for 100 Coins!

name: Militia
description: A villager that's ready to rumble.

name: Miner
effect: Twice as fast when working on a Gold Mine, Iron Mine, Rock, or Quarry
description: Way faster at harvesting Rock, Gold & Iron

name: Swordsman
description: A villager that's ready to fight!

name: Warrior
description: A Villager who goes to the gym

name: City Advisor
description: Advises you in the ways of the city

name: Genius
description: Rumored to have an IQ of 538

name: Robot Worker
description: A Worker made of metal - doesn't need Food

name: Soldier
description: Fights to keep the city safe!

name: Bone
description: Fact: a skeleton consists of many of these

name: Bottle of Water
description: A transparent bottle filled with transparent liquid

name: Charcoal
description: Functions as an antidote for Snake Poison

name: Empty Bottle
description: Made of Glass. Can be refilled!

name: Euphoria
description: A feeling or state of intense excitement and happiness

name: Gold Bar
description: A very shiny, very valuable material

name: Gold Ore
description: Can be turned in Gold Bars

name: Goop
description: Smush, sludge, gunk: it's spoilt food

name: Happiness
description: A single unit of Happiness. It keeps Villagers happy

name: Iron Ore
description: Can be turned into Iron Bars

name: Old Tome
description: A book with some Idea in it

name: Painting
description: A drawing of a French Villager

name: Plastic
description: Will be everywhere before you even know it

name: Sacred Chest
description: It needs a Sacred Key to be opened.

name: Sacred Key
description: Forged with Glass and Gold. Used for opening the Sacred Chest.

name: Sadness
description: Makes Villagers sad. You need 1 extra Happiness for every Sadness card you have.

name: Sand
description: The main ingredient for a nice beach

name: Sandstone
description: An alternative to Stone. Can be used for anything Stone is needed for.

name: Shell
description: The main currency on the Island

name: Treasure Map
description: X marks the spot. Needs to be searched with a Villager

name: Fishing Rod
description: Give it to a Villager to turn them into a Fisher

name: Axe
special: 10% chance to Bleed target

name: Bear Claw
special: *10% chance to do a Critical Hit on target

name: Blowpipe
special: 10% chance to Poison target
description: Blow as hard as you can

name: Blunderbuss
special: *15% chance to Damage all enemies
description: Watch out! Could blow up in your own face

name: Bone Spear
special: 10% chance to do a Critical Hit on target
description: Intimidating version of a regular Spear

name: Bone Staff
special: 20% chance to Lifesteal from target

name: Boomerang
special: 15% chance to Damage all enemies

name: Bow
special: 7% chance to do a Critical Hit on target
description: Makes you feel like Robin Hood

name: Broken Bottle
special: *10% chance to Bleed self

name: Club
special: 10% chance to Frenzy self for 10s

name: Crab Scale Armor
special: 10% chance to Poison target

name: Crossbow
special: 15% chance to do a Critical Hit on target

name: Dark Amulet
special: 10% chance to do a Critical Hit on random enemy
description: Its dark force makes you stronger

name: Demon Sword
special: 5% chance to Lifesteal from target
description: An excellent blade used by the Demon himself

name: Dragonscale Armor
special: 10% chance of making self anxious
description: A nice piece of armor, but at what cost...

name: Fire Cloak
special: 7% chance to do a Critical Hit on all enemies

name: Forest Amulet
special: 10% chance to Heal friendly with lowest health by 2
description: You feel the healing power of nature running through you

name: Goblin Hat
special: 5% chance to do a Critical Hit on target

name: Golden Chestplate
special: 10% chance to Stun target for 5s

name: Hammer
special: 10% chance to Stun target for 5s
description: Slow and blunt but packs a punch

name: Helmet
description: It goes on top of your head. Great for cycling

name: Horned Helmet
special: 20% chance to Bleed target

name: Iron Shield
special: 10% chance to Stun target for 5s
description: A strong defense against hard blows

name: Jester's Hat
special: 10% chance to Stun random enemy 10% chance to Poison random enemy 10% chance to Lifesteal from random enemy
description: Makes you look like a clown

name: Kraken Tooth Axe
special: 20% chance to do a Critical Hit on target
description: Left for the tooth fairy, you took it instead

name: Leather Tunic
description: Armor made from the finest leather

name: Magic Blade
special: 20% chance to Frenzy random friendly for 10s

name: Magic Broom
special: 15% chance to Heal all friendlies by 2
description: You took it from some Old Lady

name: Magic Ring
special: 10% chance to make random friendly Invulnerable for 10s
description: Once it slides on your finger it grants you magic powers

name: Magic Staff
special: *15% chance to Heal friendly with lowest health by 2

name: Magic Tome
special: *10% chance to Heal random friendly by 2
description: An old book with spells in it

name: Magic Wand
special: 10% chance to Heal friendly with lowest health by 2

name: Map
description: Use a Map to turn a Villager into an Explorer

name: Morning Star
special: 15% chance to Stun random enemy for 5s

name: Mountain Amulet
special: 10% chance to make random friendly Invulnerable for 10s

name: Pickaxe
special: 10% chance to do a Critical Hit on target
description: A stick with two pointy ends

name: Pirate Hat
special: 20% chance to Stun target for 5s

name: Pirate Sabre
special: 7% chance to make self Invulnerable for 10s

name: Purple Socks
special: 10% chance to Heal Self
description: They have small cat paws on!

name: Quiver
special: 10% chance to Bleed target

name: Rat Crown
description: Turn into the King of the Rats

name: Royal Crown
description: Gives you strength and makes you greedy

name: Scythe
description: Useful for farming and chopping down monsters

name: Skull Helmet
special: 10% chance to Lifesteal from target

special: 25% chance to Damage random enemy
description: Very inaccurately hurl rocks at enemies

special: 5% chance to do a Critical Hit on target

name: Spiked Plank
special: 7% chance to Bleed target

name: Staff of Fear
special: 20% chance to Stun random enemy for 5s

name: Sword
special: 10% chance to Bleed target
description: An Iron Bar with a pointy end

name: Throwing Stars
description: Fast and accurate, ninjas love them

name: Tiger Fur Coat
description: Trashy but at least it makes you feel strong

name: Winter Coat
special: 10% chance to Heal Self

name: Wizard Robe
special: 10% chance to make self Invulnerable for 10s

name: Wooden Shield
description: A basic defense against hard blows

name: Berry
description: A simple food found in Berry Bushes

name: Berry Bush
description: A bush with delicious berries in it

name: Ceviche
description: Sour fish, what's not to like

name: Egg
description: Can't be eaten raw: thanks salmonella

name: Fish and Chips
description: Not to be confused with Fish and Crisps

name: Flour
description: Sandy. The main ingredient for dough

name: Frittata
description: Delicious and comes with a fork

name: Grilled Fish
description: I can taste the grill marks

name: Muesli
description: Grainy breakfast: the food of the future

name: Onion
description: Can be eaten raw or can be cooked, whichever you prefer

name: Potato
description: Smooth and starchy, but should be cooked first

name: Tomato
description: Red, round and fun to throw

name: Wheat
description: It's grass for humans but heaven for animals

name: Wine
description: This grape juice is making me feel funny

name: Factory Parts
description: A small part of a big machine

name: Barracks
description: Military building that turns Workers into Soldiers and produces vehicles

name: Barrel
description: Turns wet mixtures into different wet mixtures

name: Campfire
description: Can be used to cook  - it looks warm & cozy

name: Cathedral
description: An important place of worship. It needs a relic.

name: Charity
description: Generate 1 Happiness for every 1 coin you give it

name: City Hall
description: Increases card cap by 2 for every 10 Money given to it. Can also be used to rename workers.

name: Coin Chest
description: A chest that can hold Coins

name: Crane
description: Lifts cards from one place to another

name: Dustbin
description: Allows you to get rid of cards you don't want anymore

name: Electricity Pylon
description: Brrrrzzzz. Used to organize energy cables.

name: Energy Combiner
description: Combines 3x Low Voltage and turns it into 1x High Voltage

name: Energy Splitter
description: Splits 1x High Voltage into 4x Low Voltage

name: Export Center
description: Exports resources that are placed on top of it

name: Factory
description: The beating heart of the modern era

name: Farm
description: An advanced building for growing Food

name: Filter Junction
description: Drag a Card on top to set the filter. It will output the filtered card to the top road connection, and any others to the bottom

name: Fish Trap
description: Needs a type of Food as bait

name: Frigate
description: Can carry 25 cards. Needs a villager to start sailing. Can't carry buildings.

name: Garden
description: A simple building for growing Food

name: Gold Mine
description: An unlimited resource of Gold Ore

name: Greenhouse
description: A high-tech building for growing Food. Automatically replants crops.

name: Hotpot
description: A replenishable source of Food that your Villagers can eat from. Add Food and they will eat from it at the end of the Moon!

name: Hydroponic Farm
description: Uses Water to farm more efficiently

name: Junction
description: Automatically redirects cards on top of it to its transport outputs. It cycles through the different outputs one by one

name: Lighthouse
description: Increases board size past the Warehouse limit

name: Magic Glue
description: Sticks the stack on top of it to the board and prevents it from moving

name: Market
description: Sell cards for more Coins than usual

name: Mess Hall
description: Villagers will prioritize eating food that's on top of the Mess Hall.

name: Oil Rig
description: Uses energy to drill for Oil

name: Outhouse
description: Use it to get rid of poop

name: Oven
description: Used to bake all sorts of things

name: Petting Zoo
description: Generates happiness for every animal on top of it

name: Radar Station
description: Detects attacks 3 moons before they happen

name: Resource Magnet
description: This card magically pulls cards of the same kind towards it

name: Road Builder
description: A guild for road builders, allows you to build roads between cards.

name: Rowboat
description: A rowboat to cross to a desert island.

name: Shell Chest
description: A chest with that can hold Shells

name: Sloop
description: Can carry 10 cards. Needs a Villager to start sailing. Can't carry buildings

name: Smelter
description: Processes various materials by smelting them

name: Smithy
description: A building used for creating better weapons

name: Stable Portal
description: A permanent portal to The Dark Forest

name: Stove
description: Allows you to cook faster than with a Campfire

name: University
description: A place of wisdom. Gives you a new idea every 50 Coins you gift them.

name: Wishing Well
description: It gives you a wish for every 100 coins.

name: Rumor: Combat

description: When using a Fish Trap, Banana can be used to catch Eel

description: Gold and Glass can be found on the Island

description: When using a Fish Trap, Lime can be used to catch Tuna

name: Rumour: Extraction
description: Combine a Deposit, Factory Parts and a Worker. For example, doing this with a Lumber Deposit will make a Tree Plantation
